title: Senior Associate (Advocate & Solicitor)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

At Regal Law LLC, we are committed to providing quality and affordable legal services. We strive to do our best for the clients, keeping in mind their interests and also being a trusted and reliable partner to clients.

Regal Law LLC aims to be known as a quality service provider by the courts and government agencies. With commitment to not only our clients but employees, we aim to be a likeable and trusted employer to current and future employees.

Job Summary

As an Associate at Regal Law LLC, you will contribute to high-profile criminal and civil litigation cases by applying your legal expertise and collaborating with a strong team of lawyers. You will develop your professional skills in a supportive environment that values work-life balance and long-term growth.

Responsibilities

  • Analyze complex legal issues and apply relevant laws to support criminal and civil litigation cases effectively
  • Conduct thorough legal research to inform case strategies and support litigation outcomes
  • Draft clear, precise legal documents and pleadings to advance client interests in court
  • Collaborate with team members to develop case strategies and deliver reliable legal support
  • Manage case files and documentation to ensure accuracy and compliance with legal standards
  • Communicate legal concepts and case progress clearly to clients and internal stakeholders
  • Demonstrate passion for litigation by proactively contributing to case preparation and courtroom proceedings

Required competencies and certifications

  • Hold a law degree from a recognized local or foreign institution under the Legal Profession Act
  • Possess a minimum of 3 years post-qualification experience (PQE) in litigation practice

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Ability to work effectively within a team environment to achieve case objectives

Other Information

  • Working hours: 5 Days Work Week
  • Salary (commensurate with experience): TBD
  • Duration: Permanent
  • Industry: Law firm specializing in various areas of practice such as Criminal, Family and Civil Litigation

To apply, please submit a Cover letter and Detailed resume to "ab@regallaw.com.sg". Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
